tool_mode_note: Built-in image generation tool is unavailable in this session, so this file stores ready-to-use prompts for the 16 QQTI type images.
shared_style: MBTI-inspired character illustration, polished anime-style editorial portrait, single human character only, centered composition, upper-body or three-quarter portrait, soft studio lighting, clean soft gradient background only, no props, no furniture, no scenery, no icons, no letters, no words, no speech bubbles, no watermark, no border, no collage, no extra characters, expressive face and pose, detailed hair and clothing, high-quality digital painting.
shared_constraints: The image must contain only one human character.
No text of any kind anywhere in the image.
No objects, no pets, no background scene, only a simple abstract gradient backdrop.
Keep the visual language consistent across all 16 images.

prompts.prompt: Create a MBTI-inspired character illustration. Single human character only. An energetic, outgoing young person with bright eyes, confident smile, lively open posture, one hand slightly lifted as if joining a conversation at exactly the right moment. Warm orange and peach palette, stylish modern casual outfit, charismatic but friendly presence. Clean soft gradient background only. No text, no symbols, no props, no extra objects.
